Objective Statement: Add Mosaic workflow without regressing existing Ad-hocs behavior.
Requirement Statement: The system shall render Collection Requests with sibling tabs Ad-hocs and Mosaic.

Objective Statement: Enable operators to convert an AOI into priced mosaic tiles ready for tasking.
Requirement Statement: The system shall render nested tabs Create and Tracking inside Mosaic.

Objective Statement: Enable operators to convert an AOI into priced mosaic tiles ready for tasking.
Requirement Statement: The system shall accept a valid AOI polygon input in Mosaic/Create using existing plugin AOI selection mechanisms.

Objective Statement: Enable operators to convert an AOI into priced mosaic tiles ready for tasking.
Requirement Statement: The system shall generate a 10,000m x 10,000m world grid and clip it to AOI when Breakdown AOI is executed.

Objective Statement: Enable operators to convert an AOI into priced mosaic tiles ready for tasking.
Requirement Statement: The system shall discard empty intersections and assign a unique tile_id to each resulting clipped tile within a project.

Objective Statement: Enable operators to convert an AOI into priced mosaic tiles ready for tasking.
Requirement Statement: The system shall display clipped tiles on the map and in a table with columns tile_id and clipped_area_km2.

Objective Statement: Enable operators to convert an AOI into priced mosaic tiles ready for tasking.
Requirement Statement: The system shall compute and display estimated_price_usd = sum(clipped_area_km2) * 8.0 after AOI breakdown.

Objective Statement: Ensure every tile submission attempt is persisted and traceable.
Requirement Statement: The system shall require Project ID entry before enabling Accept in Mosaic/Create.

Objective Statement: Ensure every tile submission attempt is persisted and traceable.
Requirement Statement: The system shall reject Project ID values that are empty, contain filesystem-unsafe characters, or exceed 64 characters.

Objective Statement: Ensure every tile submission attempt is persisted and traceable.
Requirement Statement: The system shall reject Accept when Project ID already exists in the active campaign mosaic namespace.

Objective Statement: Ensure every tile submission attempt is persisted and traceable.
Requirement Statement: The system shall create project folder <campaign>/collections/mosaic/<project_id>/ when Accept succeeds.

Objective Statement: Enable operators to convert an AOI into priced mosaic tiles ready for tasking.
Requirement Statement: The system shall write a shapefile of clipped tile geometries to the project folder with fields tile_id and clipped_area_km2.

Objective Statement: Ensure every tile submission attempt is persisted and traceable.
Requirement Statement: The system shall create a SQLite database in the project folder with tables for project, tile, attempt, and tile status history.

Objective Statement: Ensure every tile submission attempt is persisted and traceable.
Requirement Statement: The system shall submit one area-collect request per tile after project acceptance.

Objective Statement: Ensure every tile submission attempt is persisted and traceable.
Requirement Statement: The system shall persist one attempt record per submission with tile_id, collection_id when available, request timestamp, and error details when failed.

Objective Statement: Ensure every tile submission attempt is persisted and traceable.
Requirement Statement: The system shall continue processing remaining tiles when one tile submission fails.

Objective Statement: Support tile-level tracking with manual QA acceptance and controlled re-tasking.
Requirement Statement: The system shall let users select a mosaic project in Tracking and list tiles with tile_id, clipped_area_km2, api_status, qa_status, latest_collection_id, attempt_count, and last_sync_at.

Objective Statement: Support tile-level tracking with manual QA acceptance and controlled re-tasking.
Requirement Statement: The system shall refresh API status only for tiles where qa_status != Accepted when Refresh Status is clicked.

Objective Statement: Support tile-level tracking with manual QA acceptance and controlled re-tasking.
Requirement Statement: The system shall allow users to set qa_status=Accepted per tile and persist accepted_at and accepted_by.

Objective Statement: Support tile-level tracking with manual QA acceptance and controlled re-tasking.
Requirement Statement: The system shall allow Re-task only for tiles where qa_status != Accepted, creating a new attempt and updating latest_collection_id on success.

Objective Statement: Ensure every tile submission attempt is persisted and traceable.
Requirement Statement: The system shall load project, tile, and attempt state from SQLite when the plugin restarts and a project is reopened.

Objective Statement: Enable operators to convert an AOI into priced mosaic tiles ready for tasking.
Requirement Statement: The system shall compute price from AOI-intersection area, not full 100 km2 tile area.

Objective Statement: Support tile-level tracking with manual QA acceptance and controlled re-tasking.
Requirement Statement: The system shall not auto-set qa_status=Accepted when API reports Completed.

Objective Statement: Support tile-level tracking with manual QA acceptance and controlled re-tasking.
Requirement Statement: The system shall exclude qa_status=Accepted tiles from both Refresh Status and Re-task actions.

Objective Statement: Ensure every tile submission attempt is persisted and traceable.
Requirement Statement: The system shall enforce Project ID uniqueness per campaign and allow the same ID in different campaigns.

Objective Statement: Enable operators to convert an AOI into priced mosaic tiles ready for tasking.
Requirement Statement: The system shall produce deterministic tile sets and pricing such that repeated breakdowns of identical AOI/settings vary by no more than 0.01 km2 total area.

Objective Statement: Ensure every tile submission attempt is persisted and traceable.
Requirement Statement: The system shall wrap project creation and persistence writes in transactions so failures do not leave orphan tile-attempt links.

Objective Statement: Enable operators to convert an AOI into priced mosaic tiles ready for tasking.
Requirement Statement: The system shall complete AOI breakdown plus price computation in <= 20 s for inputs producing up to 2,000 clipped tiles on reference operator hardware.

Objective Statement: Ensure every tile submission attempt is persisted and traceable.
Requirement Statement: The system shall record audit fields created_at, updated_at, and mutation source for tile status transitions and re-task actions.
